params.name: Jane Eyre
params.description:
On Jan 4, 1847 AD, Charlotte finished writing Jane Eyre and began her final edits.
Jane Eyre is a semi-autobiographical novel by British author Charlotte Bronte. It tells the story of Jane, whose parents died when she was young, as she experiences the ups and downs of the orphanage and school life. She ends up marrying her lover, Rochester. Charlotte's description of Jane's life depicted the image of a woman who's restless with the status quo, dares to fight, and always follows higher spiritu …
